determinations.summary: See PDF and others complained against Brites Mgmt in the HR / Recruitment sector, alleging unlawful data disclosure, unlawful processing. The ODPC upheld the complaint, citing violations of Section 25, Section 26, Section 29, Section 30 of the Data Protection Act 2019. An enforcement notice was issued.
determinations.violation_summary: Margaret Manyange filed a complaint against Brites Mgmt alleging unlawful data disclosure, unlawful processing. The Complainant avers that the Respondent processed her personal data without her consent by sharing her CV with a third party. The ODPC upheld the complaint, finding violations of the Data Protection Act, 2019, and issuing an enforcement notice.

determinations.violation_summary: The ODPC initiated a suo moto investigation (ODPC/SM/0010/2025) into Capital SACCO Limited's personal data processing practices. The investigation found concerns including inappropriate use of personal images, violation of data subject rights, and failure to register as a data controller/processor. The ODPC upheld the investigation findings and issued an enforcement notice.
